title: North Lincolnshire Green Energy Park: development consent order Planning Act 2008
body: "Decision by the Secretary of State on an application for the construction of an energy from waste recovery facility (processing up to 760,000 tonnes of refuse derived fuel per year) with a generating capacity of up to 95 MW, a carbon capture usage and storage (CCUS) facility (up to 54,387 tonnes of CO2 per annum) and other associated development in Flixborough, Scunthorpe.  Date of decision  13 March 2025  Company / location   North Lincolnshire Green Energy Park LimitedColchesterEngland   Type of project  Development consent order for an energy from waste recovery facility under the Planning Act 2008.  Maximum output  95 MW.  "

taxons.title: Energy industry and infrastructure licensing and regulation
